description.en_US: A powerful tool for port forwarding, reverse proxy, dynamic DNS, wake-on-LAN, IPv4 NAT traversal, webdav services, task scheduling, and automatic certificate management.
description.zh_CN: 一款功能强大的端口转发、反向代理、动态域名、网络唤醒、IPv4内网穿透、webdav服务、计划任务和自动证书管理工具。

tagline.zh_CN: 家用软硬路由公网利器

before_install.en_US: Default login account `666`, Default login password `666`,tips:`Before each update, remember to back up the configuration`.
before_install.zh_CN: 默认登录账号 `666`，默认登录密码 `666`,提示：`每次更新前，请记得备份好配置`
